commands.review_summary:
This PR adds a single BuilderShip June 14, 2026 row to the README's upcoming 2026 conferences table.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a README content and invitation PR, not a bug report. Source inspection verifies the row is absent from current main and added by the PR branch.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] This is not a safe automated repair because accepting a speaking invitation and listing it publicly should be decided by the repository owner.

target.title: Add BuilderShip (Yacht hackathon, June 14, 2026) — and a polite invitation
target.body:
Hi Peter — we met briefly at ClawCon SF (you held my dog, Purple). This is half a PR, half a formal invitation.

We're hosting **BuilderShip** on **June 14, 2026** — an OpenClaw + AI agents hackathon where the top 40 builders in the Bay Area board an 89-foot yacht in SF, sail to Oakland for finals on the waterfront, then sunset-cruise back. $50K credits and a DGX Spark for the winner. Sponsors so far: Composio, Nebius, Tavily, OpenClaw.

We'd love to have you on the boat as a **Special Guest Speaker and Judge**.

Your *"You Can Just Do Things: How AI Is Transforming Software Development"* talk reads like the philosophical centerpiece of what we're trying to build a one-day event around — 40 builders who actually ship, a full agents stack ready from minute one, and a judging format that swaps the stage pitch for a day of 1:1 conversations. We think you'd have a great time, and the room would be very wired in.

### The ask, from your side

- A short keynote or fireside chat — whenever fits the day's flow
- Sit on the judging panel during the 1:1 builder rounds
- Walk the plank if the winner challenges you to (entirely optional ⛵)

We cover travel and everything on the day. Submissions close June 12; boat departs South Beach SF at 9 AM on June 14; we're back at the dock for the after-party that evening.

### This PR

Adds one row to the *Upcoming Conferences & Meetups in 2026+* table, slotted between Microsoft Build and the Agentic AI Summit. Merging is one (very nice) way to say yes — but honestly we'd love to hear from you either way. If the date or format doesn't work, we'd happily close this PR and just talk.

Easiest ways to reach me:

- Email: `collin@dabl.club`
- Site (and registration form): https://ship.builders
- X: [@ship_builders](https://x.com/ship_builders)

Thanks for considering. Hope to see you on the boat — Purple sends her regards.

— Colin (opencolin)
target.author: opencolin
